---
title: "Publications"
pagetitle: "Publications — DigiPols"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: publications
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, author, description, categories, image]
  date-format: "YYYY"
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: numbered
  feed: true
---

## Peer-reviewed papers & reports from DigiPols {style="border-bottom: none;"}

A growing body of work across our three research clusters: Applied Political Communication, Media & Social Media Monitoring, and Public Opinion & Argument Mining. Filter by cluster or sort by date.

---
